parameters.content:
## Get Slack alerts when PostStack publishes, fails or holds a post

### How it works
[PostStack](https://poststack.techskills.academy) - a self-hosted social media publishing and automation platform - emits a signed webhook for every post lifecycle event. This workflow verifies the `X-PostStack-Signature` HMAC header, routes `post.published`, `post.failed` and `post.held` to dedicated formatters, and pushes a readable alert to your chat via an incoming webhook. Know a scheduled post silently failed the moment it happens - not next morning.

### Setup
1. In PostStack open **Webhooks → Outbound webhooks**, click **Add endpoint** with this workflow's Production URL (the **PostStack Webhook** node) and copy the signing secret. Outbound webhooks are a PostStack Pro feature.
2. Create an incoming webhook in Slack (or Discord - append `/slack` to its webhook URL, or Mattermost/Rocket.Chat) and paste it into **Configuration (EDIT ME)** as `chatWebhookUrl`.
3. Fill in the remaining **Configuration (EDIT ME)** fields: PostStack URL and the webhook secret.
4. See the red note on **Verify Signature** for one required n8n environment setting.

### Customization tips
Edit the three **Format** Code nodes to change the wording, add channel links or mention people on failures. Add a 4th Switch rule for `post.unknown` if you want indeterminate deliveries too.

## Receive & Verify
Accepts the PostStack webhook and checks its HMAC signature before trusting the payload.

## Acknowledge & Route
Responds immediately, then routes each post lifecycle event to its own formatter.

## Format & Send
Each event type gets a readable one-liner, then a single chat node delivers it.

## Node setting required
This Code node needs `require('crypto')`. Self-hosted n8n: set `NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto` in the n8n environment, then restart.

nodes.name: PostStack Webhook
nodes.notes: Paste this node's Production URL into PostStack → Webhooks → Outbound webhooks → Add endpoint.

nodes.name: Configuration (EDIT ME)
nodes.notes: webhookSecret is the endpoint's signing secret from PostStack → Webhooks → Outbound webhooks. chatWebhookUrl accepts any incoming-webhook chat URL (Slack shown; Discord: append /slack to its webhook URL).

nodes.name: Respond OK
nodes.notes: Acknowledge before processing - PostStack retries deliveries that don't get a 2xx within 10s.

nodes.name: Route by Event
nodes.notes: post.unknown and non-post events are dropped. Add a 4th rule for post.unknown if you want those too.

nodes.name: Send Chat Alert
nodes.notes: Slack incoming webhook shown. Works with anything that accepts {"text": ...} - Discord (append /slack to its webhook URL), Mattermost, Rocket.Chat. For Telegram or ntfy swap this node.
